channel.title: Comments for page "Storm Front"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Storm Front"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This article focuses on my second favorite part of this series: the list of scps that I get to look up before reading on.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
For some reason, I believe this tale conveys the feeling of impending danger so prevalent in this canon better than its predecessors, probably because most skips reported here aren't things that I'd expect to be involved in XK scenarios, which probably means that whatever happened when Delta was opened has more to do with SCPs in general than Keters\"world-enders" specifically, contrary to what I had assumed after Revelation.

A solid entry, indeed.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Everyone's watching the world end

And I'm just sittin' here playing Majora's Mask

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What if it was the end of the world and nobody invited you?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Dredged up some SCPs I hadn't seen before. I always like that; 1688 is great.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I love how 990 seems kinda peeved. "Dammit, this isn't MY apocalypse! How dare they upstage me!"

Very nice story, and your choices of which SCPs to use is perfect.
